title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 17–19, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Reiju, Sanji, Unknown person #14, Luffy as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The more you kicked me... the harder you kicked me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I wasn't the one feeling that pain!!!...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think he kicked you one too many times in the head luffy!! I don't care what his reasons are, he crossed the line...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I don't wanna hear it!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Should we stop, Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No, carry on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Tell me, have you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ever heard of the all blue?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We're not done yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Our adventures are waiting for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not budging an inch from this spot!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If you don't come back soon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then this will be the final resting spot of my shriveled up corpse after I starve to death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way I'm letting the best chef walk away so easily!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stupid Sanji Making Pig Swill in the Kitchen Again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In fact, I'm not taking another bite of anything unless it comes from your hands!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm going on a hunger strike!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Come hell or high water!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't be budging from this spot until you come back!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't make me wait long, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: without you, I won't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I can't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Become the pirate King!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With their dreams yet unfulfilled... Luffy won't let him quit!!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 25 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
